name: Social & Community
description: Your Social & Community hire. I draft LinkedIn posts and X threads in your voice, reply on Reddit, plan the weekly social calendar across platforms, monitor timelines for signal, digest your LinkedIn activity, and pitch you into podcasts.
author: Houston Founder Marketing

agentSeeds..houston/activity.json: [{"id":"7a4e0c5a-9b2f-4d1b-8f6e-c0b4d2a7e9f3","title":"Onboard me — 3 quick questions (~90s)","description":"Click this card, then send any message to kick off onboarding. I'll ask three things: which social platforms you're active on (connected via Composio if possible), how you write (connected inbox via Composio, or 2-3 recent posts pasted), and the 3-5 topics / POV you post about. Best modality per topic: connected app via Composio (Integrations tab) > file/URL > paste.","status":"needs_you"}]

useCases.title: Draft a LinkedIn post in your voice
useCases.prompt: Draft a LinkedIn post about {topic} in my voice.
useCases.description: Hook in the first line, whitespace, one clear takeaway, CTA or question to spark replies. Uses your saved voice samples so it doesn't sound like AI.
useCases.outcome: Post draft at posts/linkedin-{slug}.md — paste into LinkedIn when you're ready.

useCases.title: Draft a 7-tweet X thread
useCases.description: Hook tweet, numbered progression, CTA tweet at the end. Each tweet fits the 280-char budget with room for edits.
useCases.outcome: Thread at threads/x-{slug}.md — copy tweet-by-tweet into your scheduler.

useCases.title: Reply to a Reddit thread the right way
useCases.prompt: Draft a Reddit reply to {thread URL}. Value-first, no pitch.
useCases.description: Pull the source thread via Reddit / Firecrawl, draft a value-first reply. Helpful first, link only if it truly belongs.
useCases.outcome: Reply at community-replies/{source-slug}.md you can paste in after a final read.

useCases.title: Plan this week's social content across platforms
useCases.prompt: Plan this week's social content across LinkedIn and X.
useCases.description: Mon–Fri plan per platform, keyed to your topics, mixing original posts with repurposed content from the SEO agent's outputs index (zero duplicate angles).
useCases.outcome: Calendar at social-calendars/{YYYY-WNN}.md + appended to the living social-calendar.md.

useCases.title: Scan your X timeline for what to engage with
useCases.prompt: Scan my X timeline and surface what's worth engaging with.
useCases.description: Filter your feed for relevance to your topics and engagement opportunities, then suggest concrete replies — no more doom-scrolling looking for something to comment on.
useCases.outcome: Digest at feed-digests/x-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md with suggested reply drafts per opportunity.

useCases.title: Weekly LinkedIn digest — how did your posts do?
useCases.prompt: Give me the weekly LinkedIn digest — how did my posts do and what's my network posting?
useCases.description: Stats on your own posts (reach, engagement, new followers) plus notable posts in your network worth commenting on. 5-min read.
useCases.outcome: Digest at linkedin-digests/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md. Skim it Monday morning.

useCases.title: Get yourself booked on your ICP's podcasts
useCases.prompt: Draft podcast outreach pitches for 5 shows our ICP listens to via Listen Notes.
useCases.description: Identify target shows by audience fit via Listen Notes. Draft per-show pitches — hook based on your positioning, angle, proof points, clear ask. No template spam.
useCases.outcome: Pitches at podcast-pitches/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md — one per show, ready to send from your own email.
